entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop grown for food, feed, fodder/forage, and fuel in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures where sorghum is widely grown

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum is grown

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum is grown

entities.name: AMERICAS
entities.description: A region where sorghum is grown

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum is grown

entities.name: HIGH YIELDING HYBRIDS
entities.description: Sorghum hybrids developed to increase grain production levels

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The level of grain production per unit area

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A biotic pest that challenges sorghum growth

entities.name: STEM BORER
entities.description: A biotic pest that challenges sorghum growth

entities.name: GRAIN MOLDS
entities.description: A biotic disease affecting sorghum grains

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress occurring at the end of the growth cycle

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization focusing on sorghum improvement

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of sorghum for desired traits

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability of a crop to produce a large amount of grain

entities.name: SHOOT FLY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist attack by shoot fly

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist grain mold infections

entities.name: SWEET STALK TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the sugar content of the sorghum stalk

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of the crop to adapt to the post-rainy season environment

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand drought during the terminal growth stage

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT CONTENTS
entities.description: The levels of essential minerals like iron and zinc in the grain

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient (Fe) targeted for increase in sorghum grain

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient (Zn) targeted for increase in sorghum grain

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing genetic variation in hybrid parents and varieties

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing variation in the cytoplasm of hybrid parents and varieties

entities.name: HYBRID PARENTS
entities.description: Parents used in the creation of sorghum hybrids

entities.name: VARIETIES
entities.description: Different types of sorghum cultivars

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The physical and chemical properties of sorghum grain

entities.name: STOVER QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the vegetative parts of the sorghum plant

entities.name: MARKET VALUE
entities.description: The economic worth of the crop based on quality requirements
